title: MAS 指引（第一部分）综述 / MAS Guidelines — Part I Overview
summary: 本章涵盖五份 MAS 文件：FA 牌照发放标准 FAA-G01、fit & proper 标准 FSG-G01、代表委任尽职调查通函 CMI 01/2011、FA 与代表行为操守标准 FAA-G04、以及"independent"用语指引 FAA-G05。 / This chapter covers five MAS instruments: licensing criteria FAA-G01, fit and proper criteria FSG-G01, due-diligence circular CMI 01/2011 for appointing representatives, standards of conduct FAA-G04, and use of the term "independent" FAA-G05.

sections.heading: FAA-G01 — FA 牌照发放标准
sections.body: 依《财务顾问法》(FAA 2001) 第 64 条发出。牌照只发给公司,且须在新加坡设立实体存在。MAS 评估时要求:至少聘用 2 名全职委任代表;CEO 与各执行董事至少 5 年相关经验(其中至少 3 年管理职)并具备认可学历/专业资格;董事会至少 2 名成员,其中至少 1 名常驻新加坡;CEO 常驻新加坡;CEO/ED 无利益冲突。

sections.heading: FAA-G01 — Licensing criteria
sections.body: Issued under s.64 of the FAA (2001). A licence is granted only to a corporation, which must establish a physical presence in Singapore. MAS requires at least 2 full-time appointed representatives; the CEO and Executive Directors to have a minimum of 5 years' relevant experience (at least 3 in a managerial capacity) plus acceptable academic/professional qualifications; a board of at least 2 members with at least one resident in Singapore; the CEO resident in Singapore; and no conflict of interest for the CEO/EDs.

sections.heading: FAA-G01 — 财务、PII 与其他门槛
sections.body: 实缴资本:一般 FA 服务 $150,000;涉及期货、即期外汇或货币 OTC 衍生品则 $300,000;两者组合 $300,000(FAR 第 15 条)。须持独立非混合专业责任险(PII)保额不低于 $500,000,免赔额不超过上一财年净资产值的 20%(FAR 第 17 条)。须有 3 年财务顾问业务的良好往绩;若不满足往绩要求,CEO 须持股不少于 20%,CEO 与 ED 合计不少于 50%。另含系统与流程、fit & proper、责任函(Letter of Responsibility)与科技风险管理等要求。

sections.heading: FAA-G01 — Financial, PII and other thresholds
sections.body: Paid-up capital: $150,000 for general FA services; $300,000 where futures, spot FX or currency OTC derivatives are advised on; $300,000 for a combination (FAR reg.15). A standalone non-hybrid PII with indemnity of not less than $500,000 is required, with a deductible no more than 20% of net asset value at the end of the immediately preceding financial year (FAR reg.17). A 3-year proven track record is expected; if not met, the CEO should own at least 20% and the CEO and EDs together at least 50% shareholding. Other requirements cover systems and processes, fit and proper, a Letter of Responsibility, and technology risk management.

sections.heading: FSG-G01 — Fit & Proper 标准
sections.body: 适用于 MAS 监管下从事受规管活动的所有相关人士。三大准则:(a) 诚实、正直与声誉;(b) 能力与胜任;(c) 财务稳健。举证责任在相关人士本身,须自证 fit & proper,而非由 MAS 反证;若某人有责任确保他人 fit & proper,则由前者向 MAS 证明后者合格。未满足任一准则不必然导致自动拒绝,MAS 会按严重性、与职责的相关性及时间久远程度综合判断。

sections.heading: FSG-G01 — Fit and proper criteria
sections.body: Applies to all relevant persons carrying out MAS-regulated activity. Three criteria: (a) honesty, integrity and reputation; (b) competence and capability; and (c) financial soundness. The onus is on each relevant person to establish that it/he is fit and proper, not for MAS to show otherwise; where one person must ensure another is fit and proper, the former must satisfy MAS of the latter. Failure to meet any one criterion does not lead to automatic refusal — MAS weighs the seriousness, relevance to duties, and passage of time.

sections.heading: CMI 01/2011 — 代表委任的尽职调查通函
sections.body: FI 的董事会与高管须制定清晰书面政策,确保只招募/留用 fit & proper 的委任、临时(provisional)或暂时(temporary)代表。须取得书面自我声明(自证已阅读并满足指引各准则),并进行独立尽职调查:核验身份证件(NRIC/FIN/护照)、向前雇主做背景查询、查 MAS 公开代表登记册及禁止令(PO)。依 SFA 第 101B 条与 FAA 第 60 条,在 PO 有效期内雇用被发 PO 者属违法。须核查破产/财务状况(IPTO 在线门户、CPF、信用机构)。自我声明是必要但不充分的措施。FI 应定期(如每年)重做自我声明与尽职调查。

sections.heading: CMI 01/2011 — Due-diligence circular
sections.body: An FI's Board and Senior Management must put in place documented policies to recruit and retain only fit and proper appointed, provisional or temporary representatives. The FI obtains written self-declarations (that the person has read and satisfies the Guidelines) and conducts independent checks: verifying identity (NRIC/FIN/passport), reference checks with previous employers, and searching MAS' Public Register of Representatives and prohibition orders (POs). Under s.101B SFA and s.60 FAA it is an offence to employ a person while a PO against him is in effect. Financial-status checks use the IPTO Online portal, CPF and credit agencies. Self-declaration is necessary but insufficient; periodic (e.g. annual) re-declaration and checks are expected.

sections.heading: CMI 01/2011 — 虚假陈述罚则与冲突评估
sections.body: 依 SFA 第 99O 条与 FAA 第 23L 条,个人向 principal 提供虚假或误导性重大陈述(随后呈交 MAS)即属犯罪,一经定罪罚款不超过 $50,000。依 SFA 第 99M(1)(n) 与 FAA 第 23J(1)(n),MAS 若认为所交资料虚假/误导,可拒绝登记、拒绝增加受规管活动/FA 服务类别,或撤销代表身份。FI 还须评估代表的利益冲突(持股、其他业务、关联人士职业等),若无法缓释则不应委任。

sections.heading: CMI 01/2011 — False statements and conflicts
sections.body: Under s.99O SFA and s.23L FAA, an individual who gives a false or misleading statement in a material particular to his principal (subsequently lodged with MAS) commits an offence, liable on conviction to a fine not exceeding $50,000. Under s.99M(1)(n) SFA and s.23J(1)(n) FAA, where MAS believes information furnished is false/misleading it may refuse register entry, refuse an additional regulated-activity/FA-service type, or revoke representative status. The FI must also assess conflicts of interest (shareholdings, other business interests, connected persons' occupations) and should not appoint where these cannot be mitigated.

sections.heading: FAA-G04 — 行为操守标准
sections.body: 列明 FA 与代表应遵守的操守:正直(诚实、公平、专业,不涉欺诈)、客观、保密(除依法交 MAS/政府机构或客户同意外不得披露)、能力(只在胜任领域提供建议、持续教育)、应有谨慎与勤勉(及时最佳执行、监督代表、停业安排)。披露义务涵盖 FA 一般资料、产品关键特征、警示与免责声明、清晰且不误导、区分事实与意见、以及报酬披露(佣金、费用、trailer/soft commission;寿险产品披露 Benefit Illustration 中的"distribution cost"即可)。

sections.heading: FAA-G04 — Standards of conduct
sections.body: Sets out conduct for FAs and representatives: integrity (honest, fair, professional, no fraud); objectivity; confidentiality (no disclosure except to MAS/government under law or with client consent); competence (advise only where competent; continuing education); and due care and diligence (prompt and best execution, supervision of representatives, orderly cessation of business). Disclosure duties cover general information about the FA, key product features, warnings/exclusions/disclaimers, clear-and-not-misleading communications, separating fact from opinion, and remuneration (commission, fees, trailer/soft commission; for a life policy, disclosing the "distribution cost" in the Benefit Illustration suffices).

sections.heading: FAA-G04 — KYC、冲突、投诉与守法
sections.body: Know Your Client:推荐前须查明客户财务目标、风险承受度、财务状况、投资经验与特定需要;建议须有合理依据并适合客户,不得以佣金回扣作推荐依据;须保存记录并由管理层定期复核;并遵守反洗钱通知 FAA-N06。利益冲突须书面披露并妥善分隔职责。须有公平、及时、适当的投诉处理程序,指定专人处理并设投诉登记册。须知悉并遵守所有适用法律法规。

sections.heading: FAA-G04 — KYC, conflicts, complaints and compliance
sections.body: Know Your Client: before recommending, determine the client's financial objectives, risk tolerance, financial situation, investment experience and particular needs; recommendations must have a reasonable basis and be suitable, and must not be based on any rebate of commissions; records must be kept and reviewed by management; comply with the AML notice FAA-N06. Conflicts of interest must be disclosed in writing with proper segregation of duties. Adequate, fair, timely complaints-handling procedures with a designated officer and a complaints register are required, alongside compliance with all applicable laws.

sections.heading: FAA-G05 — "Independent" 用语指引
sections.body: 依 FAA 第 64 条发出,规范 FA 何时可使用"independent"。核心是 FAR 第 21 条:除非 (i) 不收取/不支付会造成产品偏向的佣金或利益;(ii) 不受任何直接/间接产品限制;(iii) 无因与产品供应商关联产生的利益冲突,否则不得使用该词。基本测试:理性投资者在知悉全部事实后是否会认为顾问存在利益冲突、建议不客观公正。MAS 预期只有少数 FA 能使用该词。

sections.heading: FAA-G05 — Use of the term "independent"
sections.body: Issued under s.64 FAA, governing when an FA may use "independent". The core rule is FAR reg.21: the term may not be used unless (i) the FA receives/pays no commission or benefit that may create product bias; (ii) it operates free of any direct or indirect product restriction; and (iii) it operates without conflict of interest from any link to a product provider. The basic test is whether a reasonable investor, knowing all the facts, would perceive a conflict making the advice not objective and impartial. MAS expects only a small number of FAs to qualify.

sections.heading: FAA-G05 — 显著性、产品限制与罚则
sections.body: 佣金/利益若超过 FA 总收入的 20% 一般视为"显著";不同类别产品佣金率差异超过 20% 一般亦视为显著。产品限制:与某供应商签约只售其产品、或须达成销售目标,均属直接/间接限制;即使无合约,若每类投资产品代表少于 4 家供应商,一般不视为独立。FA 本身为产品供应商(如银行、基金公司、寿险公司)或受供应商重大影响时,不应自称独立。违反 FAR 第 21(1)/(2) 的 FA 及违反 21(3) 的代表均属犯罪。

sections.heading: FAA-G05 — Significance, product restriction and penalty
sections.body: Commissions/benefits exceeding 20% of total revenue are generally significant, as are differences in commission rates exceeding 20%. Product restriction: a contract to sell only one provider's products, or to meet sales targets, is a direct/indirect restriction; even absent a contract, representing fewer than four product providers for each class of investment product is normally not independent. An FA that is itself a product provider (bank, fund manager, life insurer) or under a provider's significant influence should not claim to be independent. An FA contravening FAR reg.21(1)/(2), and a representative contravening reg.21(3), is guilty of an offence.

keyPoints: FA 牌照只发给公司,实缴资本 $150k/$300k,PII≥$500k、免赔额≤净资产20% / FA licence only to a corporation; paid-up capital $150k/$300k; PII ≥ $500k, deductible ≤ 20% of NAV
至少 2 名全职委任代表;CEO/ED 至少 5 年经验(含 3 年管理) / At least 2 full-time appointed reps; CEO/EDs ≥ 5 years' experience (3 managerial)
Fit & proper 三准则:诚信、能力、财务稳健;举证责任在相关人士 / Three fit-and-proper criteria; onus on the relevant person
CMI 01/2011:自我声明+独立尽调;PO 期间雇用违法;虚假陈述罚款≤$50,000 / Self-declaration + independent checks; employing a PO holder is an offence; false statement fine ≤ $50,000
FAA-G04:正直/客观/保密/能力/谨慎、披露、KYC、合理依据、投诉处理 / FAA-G04 conduct, disclosure, KYC, reasonable basis, complaints
"Independent":FAR 第21条+20%显著性阈值+每类至少4家供应商 / "Independent": FAR reg.21, 20% significance threshold, ≥ 4 providers per class
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.8 — MAS Guidelines FAA-G01, FSG-G01, FAA-G04, FAA-G05 & Circular CMI 01/2011
